caveats: The stop condition is family-level reference-review universe exhaustion: all 103 families have v3 representatives, but 140 same-family projects were not individually rendered after family coverage and a 24-project ranked extra pass produced no promotions.
PyMuPDF was unavailable in the local runtime, so the renderer used the Poppler pdftoppm fallback with the same temporary-render deletion contract.
No source-pool sufficiency conclusion can be reached because v3 produced zero new reference-complete projects.
